text_excerpt: Surgery in Penarth | Cymhorthfa ym Mhenarth — Stephen Doughty MP 0 Skip to Content Stephen Doughty MP Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Open Menu Close Menu Stephen Doughty MP Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Open Menu Close Menu Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Surgery in Penarth | Cymhorthfa ym Mhenarth 10 Feb Written By Stephen Doughty I held a busy constituency surgery in Penarth with members of my team - lots of local, national and international issues were raised, and we helped residents with their specific concerns. If you need my help, or want to raise an issue, please email stephen.doughty.mp@parliament.uk ___ Cynhaliais gymhorthfa brysur ym Mhenarth gyda aelodau o’n tîm. Codwyd lot o faterion lleol, cenedlaethol a rhyngwladol, a bu modd inni gynorthwyo trigolion gyda’u pryderon penodol. Os oes angen fy nghymorth arnoch, neu os hoffech godi mater, anfonwch e-bost at stephen.doughty.mp@parliament.uk .
